creator: unitrunker@gmail.com
text:
I tried five cards.

One FAT32 formatted 16 GB and one UFS formatted 256 GB card worked.
A FAT32 formatted 8 GB and FAT32 formatted 32 GB card failed.
An NTFS formatted 256 GB card also failed.
